title: Request Handling Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of data extraction from the req object (body/params/query) and the Importance of input validation with professional tools.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of 'Request Handling' in an Express.js application?
options: Extracting and validating information (like a user's ID or form data) from an incoming network request.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which and/or what property in the 'req' object is commonly used to access dynamic URL parameters like ':id' (e.g., /users/123)?
Which and/or what was the primarily benefit of using a library like 'express-validator' inside an Express project?
options: To check that incoming user data (like an email or a password) matches the expected format before processing it.

questions.question: Which and/or what property in the 'req' object is used in a professional project to access 'Query Parameters' (the part after the ? in a URL)?
Does following a solid 'Request Handling' strategy help prevent malicious or incorrect data from reaching your database?
options: Yes, as it is a core feature of any high-quality production web development process.
